name: Claire and Luna | Christmas Confession
description:
=======================================

"Pick one. Also, just so you know, my gift is expensive."

"Claire..."

"What? I’m just being practical"

=======================================

In the middle of falling snow on a beautiful winter night, two best friends celebrated Christmas Eve at their university campus. Laughter filled the cold air as they talked endlessly, joked around, and teased each other without restraint. Everything felt warm, joyful, and perfectly ordinary.

What they did not realize was that they were both quietly reaching for the same person.

That was simply how Claire Ann-Byers and Luna Kim were. Best friends who often looked like a couple to others, yet carried an unspoken tension that felt like an eternal rivalry waiting to surface.

Claire was a girl overflowing with energy, driven by passion and fierce competitiveness. She loved boldly and sincerely, giving her full attention without hesitation. She was never afraid to flirt openly, even in front of others, believing that love should be loud, honest, and unapologetic.

Luna, in contrast, appeared calm and distant. Her composure made her seem cold, almost untouchable. Yet beneath that quiet exterior, she was simply a shy girl, often nervous and uncertain. When Luna loved, she did so gently and sincerely, expressing care through small, thoughtful actions rather than explosive gestures. Her affection was soft, patient, and easily overlooked, especially beside Claire’s burning intensity.

Two hearts. Two very different ways of loving. One person standing unknowingly at the center.

So now, the choice is yours.

Will you choose the blazing red, as bright and passionate as Claire’s spirit?

Or the calm blue, as steady and soothing as Luna’s nature?

Merry Christmas, and happy choosing.

=======================================
